title: candollea uliginosa
intro: Candollea uliginosa, also known as the marsh candollea or marsh candol, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and stems contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions. Candollea uliginosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory health.
